typecheck.details: Full build pipeline succeeds with no errors

lint.command: cd system && cargo build --release 2>&1 | grep 'unused import'
lint.details: No unused import warnings (exit 1 from grep = no matches found)

fonts_build.details: Fonts library builds under aarch64 target. 2 pre-existing unused variable warnings (lsb_fu) not from this milestone.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Unused `use drawing::Color;` import in compositor/cursor.rs (line 3). No compile warning in direct-rustc context but the import is unnecessary.
3 trailing blank lines at end of drawing/lib.rs after code removal. Cosmetic.
system/DESIGN.md line 108 still references removed files (truetype.rs, rasterizer.rs, font_data.rs). Documentation is stale after this milestone's changes to drawing's contents.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/build-system.md: compositor submodule list now includes damage.rs, compositing.rs, cursor.rs, svg.rs (added by move-compositor-concerns-from-drawing and extract-decoders-from-drawing features). Removed stale scene_state.rs reference.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the test-local-copy pattern: when refactoring moves types from libraries to services, tests can't import from services, so pure-computation types/functions must be duplicated as test-local copies. Add guidance on: (1) marking copies with '// test-local copy of <service>::<type>' comments, (2) keeping copies minimal (only the subset needed for testing), (3) risk that copies can silently diverge from their canonical sources.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features remove-textlayout-from-drawing and move-compositor-concerns-from-drawing both used this pattern. system/test/tests/drawing.rs now has 7+ test-local copies. Both feature reviewers flagged this as an undocumented emerging pattern. The refactor-worker skill doesn't mention it.

rejectedObservations.observation: PNG decoder was placed in test crate rather than a service consumer, deviating from feature description wording.
rejectedObservations.reason: Correct decision — no service currently consumes PNG. The description was imprecise, not the implementation. Not an actionable shared state change.

rejectedObservations.observation: Inter-feature dependency between move-glyph-cache-to-fonts and remove-textlayout (fonts dependency kept in drawing temporarily).
rejectedObservations.reason: Informational. The dependency was correctly managed by workers. No shared state change needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: system/DESIGN.md line 108 is stale after drawing refactoring.
rejectedObservations.reason: Documentation staleness is a non-blocking issue already captured above. Not a shared-state concern requiring library/services.yaml/AGENTS.md changes. The orchestrator or user can update DESIGN.md at their discretion.
